phase_name: Per-subagent independent iteration budgets (retire PROV-10; T-28.1-16)

completed_tasks.name: Broaden ROADMAP Phase 35 title/goal + STATE roadmap-evolution

decisions.decision: Switch to per-subagent independent iteration budgets globally (interactive + cron); each child gets a fresh BudgetHandle::new(delegation.max_iterations) instead of cloning the parent's Arc
decisions.rationale: Matches hermes-agent reference; resolves T-28.1-16 as a side effect since no subagent charges its parent's budget

decisions.decision: Retire PROV-10 shared parent/child counter; runaway bounded by max_spawn_depth × max_concurrent_children × delegation.max_iterations (no tree-wide ceiling)
decisions.rationale: Reference-style guard; depth (Phase 32.2) + concurrency semaphore already exist

decisions.decision: delegation.max_iterations already exists in SubagentConfig (config.rs:982, default 50) — no new config field; change is the wiring at subagent_runner.rs:282-284
Defer subagent handoff to a future phase; DROP budget refresh/top-up entirely
decisions.rationale: Handoff is net-new design (reference analog is kanban); refresh tensions with DoS containment

next_action: Run /gsd-plan-phase 35. Planner MUST read 35-CONTEXT.md first — the cron-specific architecture in docs/AGENT-RUNTIME-DESIGN.md §8 is SUPERSEDED by the global per-subagent model.
context_notes: Phase 35 pivoted mid-discussion from cron-specific isolation to a global delegation-budget-model change after investigating the Python reference (hermes-agent/tools/delegate_tool.py: per-subagent own budget, default 50, no shared counter). All decisions locked in 35-CONTEXT.md. Key change site: subagent_runner.rs:282-284 (replace budget.clone() shared Arc with a fresh per-child BudgetHandle). PROV-10 doc-comment at subagent_runner.rs:34-39 and its regression test(s) must be inverted. No source code changed yet — discussion + roadmap only.
